TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == sakatusa lekad ni Cwan-pu amalacungtung a sapatŚ∑ĚśôģÁ¨¨šļĆŚĪÜšĽĽśúüťóúÁ®Ö Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu i sakatusa lekad Amilika a kalacungtungan yadah ku nikawawan tu micunus tu sata, I 2025 a mihca 4 a bulad 2 a demiad m usakamu "palalecad tu sata" "kamu nu Ing, Reciprocal Tariff" sakay kitakit a gingku mutesek ku nikasasetul. hatini katene ku nipalekal ni Cwan-pu tu micumuday a sata, misudang kalaliaca atu micuay cinizaan "hinisa mipenec midisdis" ku Amilika a kanatal. Cwan-pu a sakatusa lekad a kalacungtungan a sata pacaub tu sapisiwbay nu Amilika misabalucu' midiput macakat lekakawa. Kanahatu ci Cwan-pu i saayaway lekad a cen-bu sakay 3800 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw micumuday a tuud niala a sata, nika palaayaw katukuh 2025 a mihca 4 a bulad, u sakatusa lekad niza malacungtung piala nu cen-bu tu sata pulunng a kalisiw malakui' ku 1.4 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw Cwan-pu i 2025 a mihca 1 a bulad muliyaw aca malacungtung, zikuz atu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow nu misiwbayay malalid ku nikalepacaw,m akay 4 a bulad 11 a demiad malingatu uynian a kanatal macakat tu 145% pesen ku sata. palekal tu sakatus tu sakay Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke ngayaw nu misiwbayay, hamin nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke a tuud niala tu sata 25% pesen. nika zikauz caay tu piala tu matatungusay a USMCA "nikaketunan nu Mey-Mu-Cya a tuud. Cwan-pu uyni a kawaw paketun miazih tuyni a kanatal tu sakay mikuliniway tu ledek a tuud atu situngus tu sunuk sanay malimad, namahini micukel tu kanatalay nu misangaa' a kawaw. 2025 a mihca 3 a bulad 4 a dimiad, ci Cwan-pu hamin nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow sata nu micumuday a tuud macakat tu 20% pesen. miala haca ciniza tu 25% pesan a sata nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke, nika zikuz caay tu piala tu sata nu misiwbayay a tuud, katukuh 4 a bulad 2 a demiad. ci Cwan-pu patabaki aca i hami nu hekal tu sata, sakay hekalay mukin atu alumi a tuud miala tu 25% pesen ku sata, uyni a lekakawa I 3 a bulad 12 a dem iad malingatu. 4 a bulad 2 a demiad, ci Cwan-pu misabalucu' mihapiw tu hamin nu hekalay a sata, makay 4 a bulad 5 a demiad malingatu pasayza hamin nu hekalay hamin nu micumiday a tuud nu misiwbayay micunus tu micumuday a sata tu 10% pesen, 4 a bulad 9 a demiad malingatu pasayza 60 a kanatal micunus tu zumaay a sate. 4 a bulad 3 a demiad malingatu, hami nu micumuday tayza Amilika kazizeng miala tu sata 25% pesan kazizeng a keysi paayaw malecad amala. Cya-na-ta Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow atu Ow-mung masakamu tu amiala tu sata a kawaw, zuma a kanatal amalingatu atu Amilika cen-bu masakalah misudang, amikawaw, amilawa' tu kayadah nu kacaculi nu misiwbayay. 4śúą3śó•ŤĶ∑, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == sakatusa r~…ĺ…ôkad ni ¶wan-pu amar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇč a sapat********* taŇč-na* ¶wan-pu i sakatusa r~…ĺ…ôkad amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇčan jadańß ku nikawawan tu mi ¶unus tu sata, i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad m usakamu "par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu sata" "kamu nu iŇč, *…ô ¶ipro ¶ar~…ĺ tariff" sakaj kitakit a giŇčku mut…ôs…ôk ku nikasas…ôtur~…ĺ. ńßatini kat…ôn…ô ku nipar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ ni ¶wan-pu tu mi ¶umudaj a sata, misudaŇč kar~…ĺar~…ĺia ¶a atu mi ¶uaj ¶inizaan "ńßinisa mip…ôn…ô ¶ midisdis" ku amir~…ĺika a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶wan-pu a sakatusa r~…ĺ…ôkad a kar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇčan a sata pa ¶aub tu sapisiwbaj nu amir~…ĺika misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° midiput ma ¶akat r~…ĺ…ôkakawa. kanańßatu ¶i ¶wan-pu i saajawaj r~…ĺ…ôkad a ¶…ôn-bu sakaj **** war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw mi ¶umudaj a tuud niar~…ĺa a sata, nika par~…ĺaajaw katukuńß **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, u sakatusa r~…ĺ…ôkad niza mar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇč piar~…ĺa nu ¶…ôn-bu tu sata pur~…ĺunŇč a kar~…ĺisiw mar~…ĺakui Ē~ ° ku *.* war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn amir~…ĺika a kar~…ĺisiw ¶wan-pu i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad mur~…ĺijaw a ¶a mar~…ĺa ¶uŇčtuŇč, zikuz atu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow nu misiwbajaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw,m akaj * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ ma ¶akat tu ***% p…ôs…ôn ku sata. par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakatus tu sakaj ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô Ňčajaw nu misiwbajaj, ńßamin nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô a tuud niar~…ĺa tu sata **% p…ôs…ôn. nika zikauz ¶aaj tu piar~…ĺa tu matatuŇčusaj a usm ¶a "nikak…ôtunan nu m…ô-mu- ¶ja a tuud. ¶wan-pu ujni a kawaw pak…ôtun miazińß tujni a kanatar~…ĺ tu sakaj mikur~…ĺiniwaj tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a tuud atu situŇčus tu sunuk sanaj mar~…ĺimad, namańßini mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺaj nu misaŇčaa Ē~ ° a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad, ¶i ¶wan-pu ńßamin nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow sata nu mi ¶umudaj a tuud ma ¶akat tu **% p…ôs…ôn. miar~…ĺa ńßa ¶a ¶iniza tu **% p…ôsan a sata nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô, nika zikuz ¶aaj tu piar~…ĺa tu sata nu misiwbajaj a tuud, katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad. ¶i ¶wan-pu patabaki a ¶a i ńßami nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sata, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mukin atu ar~…ĺumi a tuud miar~…ĺa tu **% p…ôs…ôn ku sata, ujni a r~…ĺ…ôkakawa i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ôm iad mar~…ĺiŇčatu. * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, ¶i ¶wan-pu misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mińßapiw tu ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a sata, makaj * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj ńßamin nu mi ¶umidaj a tuud nu misiwbajaj mi ¶unus tu mi ¶umudaj a sata tu **% p…ôs…ôn, * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza ** a kanatar~…ĺ mi ¶unus tu zumaaj a sat…ô. * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßami nu mi ¶umudaj tajza amir~…ĺika kaziz…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu sata **% p…ôsan kaziz…ôŇč a k…ôsi paajaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad amar~…ĺa. ¶ja-na-ta ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow atu ow-muŇč masakamu tu amiar~…ĺa tu sata a kawaw, zuma a kanatar~…ĺ amar~…ĺiŇčatu atu amir~…ĺika ¶…ôn-bu masakar~…ĺańß misudaŇč, amikawaw, amir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu kajadańß nu ka ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi nu misiwbajaj. *****, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == sakatusa lekad ni Cwan-pu amalacungtung a sapatŚ∑ĚśôģÁ¨¨šļĆŚĪÜšĽĽśúüťóúÁ®Ö Tang-na¬∑Cwan-pu i sakatusa lekad Amilika a kalacungtungan yadah ku nikawawan tu micunus tu sata, I 2025 a mihca 4 a bulad 2 a demiad m usakamu "palalecad tu sata" "kamu nu Ing, Reciprocal Tariff" sakay kitakit a gingku mutesek ku nikasasetul. hatini katene ku nipalekal ni Cwan-pu tu micumuday a sata, misudang kalaliaca atu micuay cinizaan "hinisa mipenec midisdis" ku Amilika a kanatal. Cwan-pu a sakatusa lekad a kalacungtungan a sata pacaub tu sapisiwbay nu Amilika misabalucu' midiput macakat lekakawa. Kanahatu ci Cwan-pu i saayaway lekad a cen-bu sakay 3800 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw micumuday a tuud niala a sata, nika palaayaw katukuh 2025 a mihca 4 a bulad, u sakatusa lekad niza malacungtung piala nu cen-bu tu sata pulunng a kalisiw malakui' ku 1.4 walwalen Amilika a kalisiw Cwan-pu i 2025 a mihca 1 a bulad muliyaw aca malacungtung, zikuz atu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow nu misiwbayay malalid ku nikalepacaw,m akay 4 a bulad 11 a demiad malingatu uynian a kanatal macakat tu 145% pesen ku sata. palekal tu sakatus tu sakay Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke ngayaw nu misiwbayay, hamin nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke a tuud niala tu sata 25% pesen. nika zikauz caay tu piala tu matatungusay a USMCA "nikaketunan nu Mey-Mu-Cya a tuud. Cwan-pu uyni a kawaw paketun miazih tuyni a kanatal tu sakay mikuliniway tu ledek a tuud atu situngus tu sunuk sanay malimad, namahini micukel tu kanatalay nu misangaa' a kawaw. 2025 a mihca 3 a bulad 4 a dimiad, ci Cwan-pu hamin nu Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow sata nu micumuday a tuud macakat tu 20% pesen. miala haca ciniza tu 25% pesan a sata nu Cya-na-ta atu Mu-si-ke, nika zikuz caay tu piala tu sata nu misiwbayay a tuud, katukuh 4 a bulad 2 a demiad. ci Cwan-pu patabaki aca i hami nu hekal tu sata, sakay hekalay mukin atu alumi a tuud miala tu 25% pesen ku sata, uyni a lekakawa I 3 a bulad 12 a dem iad malingatu. 4 a bulad 2 a demiad, ci Cwan-pu misabalucu' mihapiw tu hamin nu hekalay a sata, makay 4 a bulad 5 a demiad malingatu pasayza hamin nu hekalay hamin nu micumiday a tuud nu misiwbayay micunus tu micumuday a sata tu 10% pesen, 4 a bulad 9 a demiad malingatu pasayza 60 a kanatal micunus tu zumaay a sate. 4 a bulad 3 a demiad malingatu, hami nu micumuday tayza Amilika kazizeng miala tu sata 25% pesan kazizeng a keysi paayaw malecad amala. Cya-na-ta Cong-hwa-zen-min-kung-he-kow atu Ow-mung masakamu tu amiala tu sata a kawaw, zuma a kanatal amalingatu atu Amilika cen-bu masakalah misudang, amikawaw, amilawa' tu kayadah nu kacaculi nu misiwbayay. 4śúą3śó•ŤĶ∑, . malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan

mar~…ĺar~…ĺid ku nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶aw,m akaj * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu ujnian a kanatar~…ĺ ma ¶akat tu ***% p…ôs…ôn ku sata. par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu sakatus tu sakaj ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô Ňčajaw nu misiwbajaj, ńßamin nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô a tuud niar~…ĺa tu sata **% p…ôs…ôn. nika zikauz ¶aaj tu piar~…ĺa tu matatuŇčusaj a usm ¶a "nikak…ôtunan nu m…ô-mu- ¶ja a tuud. ¶wan-pu ujni a kawaw pak…ôtun miazińß tujni a kanatar~…ĺ tu sakaj mikur~…ĺiniwaj tu r~…ĺ…ôd…ôk a tuud atu situŇčus tu sunuk sanaj mar~…ĺimad, namańßini mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu kanatar~…ĺaj nu misaŇčaa Ē~ ° a kawaw. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a dimiad, ¶i ¶wan-pu ńßamin nu ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow sata nu mi ¶umudaj a tuud ma ¶akat tu **% p…ôs…ôn. miar~…ĺa ńßa ¶a ¶iniza tu **% p…ôsan a sata nu ¶ja-na-ta atu mu-si-k…ô, nika zikuz ¶aaj tu piar~…ĺa tu sata nu misiwbajaj a tuud, katukuńß * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad. ¶i ¶wan-pu patabaki a ¶a i ńßami nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu sata, sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj mukin atu ar~…ĺumi a tuud miar~…ĺa tu **% p…ôs…ôn ku sata, ujni a r~…ĺ…ôkakawa i * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ôm iad mar~…ĺiŇčatu. * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, ¶i ¶wan-pu misabar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° mińßapiw tu ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a sata, makaj * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj ńßamin nu mi ¶umidaj a tuud nu misiwbajaj mi ¶unus tu mi ¶umudaj a sata tu **% p…ôs…ôn, * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu pasajza ** a kanatar~…ĺ mi ¶unus tu zumaaj a sat…ô. * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ńßami nu mi ¶umudaj tajza amir~…ĺika kaziz…ôŇč miar~…ĺa tu sata **% p…ôsan kaziz…ôŇč a k…ôsi paajaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad amar~…ĺa. ¶ja-na-ta ¶oŇč-ńßwa-z…ôn-min-kuŇč-ńß…ô-kow atu ow-muŇč masakamu tu amiar~…ĺa tu sata a kawaw, zuma a kanatar~…ĺ amar~…ĺiŇčatu atu amir~…ĺika ¶…ôn-bu masakar~…ĺańß misudaŇč, amikawaw, amir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° tu kajadańß nu ka ¶a ¶ur~…ĺi nu misiwbajaj. *****, . mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
